ns0:entry.ns0:title: Azure/azure-sdk-for-net
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net
Language: c%23
This repository is for active development of the Azure SDK for .NET. For consumers of the SDK we recommend visiting our public developer docs at https://learn.microsoft.com/dotnet/azure/ or our versioned developer docs at https://azure.github.io/azure-sdk-for-net.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Goob-Station/Goob-Station
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Goob-Station/Goob-Station
Language: c%23
We're not even close to "Wizden, but random" at this point. Super chud SS14 fork. By chuds, for chuds.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: MonoGame/MonoGame
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/MonoGame/MonoGame
Language: c%23
One framework for creating powerful cross-platform games.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: PunishXIV/Splatoon
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/PunishXIV/Splatoon
Language: c%23
An accessibility tool to assist in gameplay and compensate for human imperfections.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: QuantConnect/Lean
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/QuantConnect/Lean
Language: c%23
Lean Algorithmic Trading Engine by QuantConnect (Python, C#)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Radarr/Radarr
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Radarr/Radarr
Language: c%23
Movie organizer/manager for usenet and torrent users.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Seafoam-Labs/Shelly-ALPM
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Seafoam-Labs/Shelly-ALPM
Language: c%23

ns0:entry.ns0:title: TechnitiumSoftware/DnsServer

ns0:entry.ns0:title: bloxstraplabs/bloxstrap
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/bloxstraplabs/bloxstrap
Language: c%23
An alternative bootstrapper for Roblox with a bunch of extra features.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/android
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/android
Language: c%23
.NET for Android provides open-source bindings of the Android SDK for use with .NET managed languages such as C#

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/aspnetcore
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/aspnetcore
Language: c%23
ASP.NET Core is a cross-platform .NET framework for building modern cloud-based web applications on Windows, Mac, or Linux.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/roslyn
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/roslyn
Language: c%23
The Roslyn .NET compiler provides C# and Visual Basic languages with rich code analysis APIs.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/sdk
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/sdk
Language: c%23
Core functionality needed to create .NET Core projects, that is shared between Visual Studio and CLI

ns0:entry.ns0:title: files-community/Files
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/files-community/Files
Language: c%23
A modern file manager that helps users organize their files and folders.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/jellyfin/jellyfin
Language: c%23

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ppy/osu-framework

ns0:entry.ns0:title: tModLoader/tModLoader
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/tModLoader/tModLoader
Language: c%23
A mod to make and play Terraria mods. Supports Terraria 1.4 (and earlier) installations

ns0:entry.ns0:title: unoplatform/uno
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/unoplatform/uno
Language: c%23
Open-source platform for building cross-platform native Mobile, Web, Desktop and Embedded apps quickly. Create rich, C#/XAML, single-codebase apps from any IDE. Hot Reload included! 90m+ NuGet Downloads!!
